a:r.a:t: The value of a cloud foundation

p:cNvPr.name: Picture 47
p:cNvPr.descr:
A close-up of a blue object
AI-generated content may be incorrect.

a:r.a:t: Lack of access to models and compute power
Redundant, manual processes, lack of power
Siloed databases, lack of integration, fragmented
Wide access to models, powerful compute for scale
Only pay for what you use
Keep up with local and global regulations
